     Run `npm run build:catalog` to regenerate; `npm run check` fails if it drifts. -->

# Composa UI — component catalog

The components exposed by `@composa-ui/react` (schema 1, renderer
`react-app`). Use the exact prop values listed here — do not invent props or
variants. Each family is sourced from Figma UI3 and implemented in `src/react/factory.js`.

For usage, anatomy, and accessibility (the prose this catalog deliberately does NOT
duplicate), see the Storybook: https://composa-ui.github.io/react — or, if running it
locally, the Storybook MCP at `http://localhost:6011/mcp`
(`list-all-documentation` → `get-documentation`), which is always in sync.

## Component families

### Button — 184 variants
_Figma: UI3 Button · node 2012:46721 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `variant`: primary · secondary · ghost · link · link-danger · destructive · secondary-destruct · inverse · success
- `size`: default · large · small
- `width`: auto · fill
- `state`: default · hover · active · focused
- `disabled`: boolean
- `iconLead`: false · left-aligned · center-aligned
- `label`: string
- `hotkey`: boolean

### IconButton — 62 variants
_Figma: UI3 Button icon · Button icon toggle · Button icon dialog toggle · node 2012:46721 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `component`: iconbutton · togglebutton · dialogtogglebutton · splitbutton
- `variant`: primary · secondary · ghost · link · link-danger · destructive · secondary-destruct · inverse · success · highlighted
- `size`: small · default · large · xlarge
- `width`: auto · fill
- `state`: default · hover · active · focused · primary-active · secondary-active · primary-focus · secondary-focus · disabled
- `disabled`: boolean
- `pressed`: boolean
- `context`: default · on-selected
- `icon`: IconName
- `label`: string
- `alignmentNote`: variant shares Button's vocabulary across the family; size maps to the icon box for IconButton/Toggle; width applies to SplitButton only (IconButton/Toggle stay square).

### InputField — 119 variants
_Figma: UI3 Inputs · node 2028:75376 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `componentSet`: text-input · color-input · numeric-input · numeric-input-multi · combo-input · _combo-input-dropdown
- `shape`: circle · square
- `variant`: single-line · multi-line · quick-action · default · partial-disable
- `size`: default · large
- `width`: auto · fill
- `state`: default · focus · focused · hover · active · empty · disabled · disabled-secondary · disabled-tertiary · variable · active-empty · active-filled · selected-input · selected-chevron · selected-input · selected-chevron
- `dropdownState`: default · hover · active
- `type`: fill · opacity · image · gradient · variable · instance
- `disabled`: boolean
- `varIcon`: boolean
- `varPill`: boolean
- `iconLead`: boolean
- `dropdown`: boolean
- `variable`: boolean
- `closeButton`: boolean
- `mixed`: boolean
- `label`: string
- `value`: string

### Dropdown — 16 variants
_Figma: UI3 Dropdown · node 2028:36589 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `size`: default · large
- `width`: auto · fill
- `state`: default · focused · active
- `disabled`: boolean
- `stroke`: boolean
- `iconLead`: boolean

### Switch — 24 variants
_Figma: UI3 Switch · node 2015:24697 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `size`: default · compact
- `type`: off · on · mixed
- `state`: default · hover · focused · disabled
- `checked`: boolean
- `mixed`: boolean
- `disabled`: boolean
- `label`: string

### Radio — 20 variants
_Figma: UI3 Radio · node 2015:20365 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `variant`: input · button
- `state`: default · hover · active · focused · disabled
- `checked`: boolean
- `disabled`: boolean
- `label`: string

### Checkbox — 12 variants
_Figma: UI3 Checkbox · node 2012:55461 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `state`: default · focused
- `type`: unchecked · checked · mixed
- `disabled`: boolean
- `muted`: boolean
- `ghost`: boolean
- `label`: boolean
- `description`: boolean
- `labelText`: string
- `descriptionText`: string

### Tooltip — 16 variants
_Figma: UI3 Tooltip · node 2015:32842 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `placement`: top · right · bottom · left · top-left · top-right · bottom-left · bottom-right
- `tone`: default · inverse
- `label`: string

### Dialog — 6 variants
_Figma: UI3 Modal (Modal header / Modal body / Modal footer) · Templates/320 (Basic, Advanced) · Templates/480 (Embed, Create Project, Create Team, Sharing) · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `size`: 320 · 480 · small · default · large
- `variant`: basic · advanced · embed · create-project · create-team · sharing
- `tone`: default · destructive
- `title`: string
- `description`: string
- `primaryLabel`: string
- `secondaryLabel`: string

### SegmentedControl — 20 variants
_Figma: UI3 Segmented control · node 2015:20960 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `variant`: icon · label
- `options`: SegmentedOption[]
- `selected`: per SegmentedOption
- `state`: default · disabled
- `disabled`: boolean

### Tabs — 11 variants
_Figma: UI3 Tabs · node 2015:25519 · _Tab node 2015:27758 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `variant`: underline · pill
- `size`: default · compact
- `state`: default · focused · hover
- `tabs`: TabItem[]
- `selected`: per TabItem

### MenuRow — 63 variants
_Figma: UI3 Menu · node 2028:86486 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `type`: simple · complex · checkmark · toggle · toolbar · heading · divider · expand · footer
- `state`: default · hover · disabled
- `submenu`: boolean
- `selected`: boolean
- `lead`: false · avatar · icon
- `trail`: false · shortcut · badge · checkbox · mixed
- `checkVariant`: check · dot
- `toggleState`: on · off
- `hasIcon`: boolean
- `expanded`: boolean
- `alignment`: default · toggle
- `label`: string
- `containerVariant`: default · label-only · avatars · mixed-icons

### CanvasSelectionOverlay — 16 variants
_Figma: UI2 Canvas decorations · node 0:20495 · source: src/react/factory.js_

- `type`: standard · textedit · component · instance · autolayout · smartselectionhorizontal · smartselectionvertical · smartselectiongrid · imagecrop · vector · slice · reparenting · cover
- `direction`: horizontal · vertical · both
- `width`: number
- `height`: number
- `showDimensions`: boolean

## Support components & primitives

ListCell · DialogRow · DialogHeaderCell · DialogHeader · DialogBody · DialogFooter · MenuHeadingCell · Header · HeaderActions · OverlayLayer · OverlayHost · OverlayPortal · ComposaAppIcon · NavigationRailItem · AppNavigationRail · NavigatorHeader · CollapseHeader · SlideThumb · SlideList · EditorNavigator · SlidesNavigator · VerticalCell · TextPair · Label · Menu · MenuMultiSelect · EditorToolbar · EditorShell · SlidesEditorTemplate · CommentComposer · CommentItem · CommentThreadWindow · Badge · BadgeAnchor · NotificationBell · Notification · VisualBell

> Overlays (`OverlayHost`, `OverlayPortal`, `OverlayLayer`) are required infrastructure:
> every tooltip, menu, and dialog portals into the nearest `OverlayHost`. See SKILL.md.
